meta.title: Lok Sabha 2024 general-election winners — affidavit snapshot
meta.primarySource: Election Commission of India candidate affidavits via MyNeta winner summaries
meta.note: The 543 winners declared after the 2024 Lok Sabha general election, enriched from the complete LokSabha2024 candidate-affidavit shard. This is an election-result snapshot, not a claim about current or sitting membership. Assets and liabilities are self-declared, not audited market wealth. Age, gender, PAN and serious-case values are unavailable in this archive and remain null.
